mapper.select:
SELECT w.id, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_code, w.address, w.region, w.manager_id, w.safety_stock, w.create_time, u.real_name AS manager_name FROM warehouse w LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = w.manager_id AND u.deleted = 0
w.deleted = 0
AND (w.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR w.warehouse_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND w.region = #{region}
ORDER BY w.create_time DESC, w.id DESC

SELECT w.id, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_code, w.address, w.region, w.manager_id, w.safety_stock, w.create_time, u.real_name AS manager_name FROM warehouse w LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = w.manager_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE w.id = #{id} AND w.deleted = 0
